copy_to_clipboard.title: Copy
copy_to_clipboard.summary: Copy the selection to the clipboard.

select_all.title: Select all
select_all.summary: Select all of the terminal text.

adjust_selection.title: Adjust selection
adjust_selection.summary: Extend the selection with the keyboard.

clear_screen.title: Clear screen
clear_screen.summary: Clear the screen and its scrollback.

reset_font_size.title: Reset font size
reset_font_size.summary: Return the text to its configured size.

toggle_background_opacity.title: Toggle transparency
toggle_background_opacity.summary: Flip the window between opaque and see-through.

navigate_search.title: Navigate search
navigate_search.summary: Move to the next or previous match.

scroll_to_selection.title: Scroll to selection
scroll_to_selection.summary: Scroll the current selection into view.

scroll_to_top.title: Scroll to top
scroll_to_top.summary: Jump to the top of the scrollback.

jump_to_prompt.title: Jump to prompt
jump_to_prompt.summary: Move to the previous or next shell prompt.

write_screen_file.title: Save screen
write_screen_file.summary: Write the visible screen to a file.

write_scrollback_file.title: Save scrollback
write_scrollback_file.summary: Write the full scrollback to a file.

write_selection_file.title: Save selection
write_selection_file.summary: Write the selected text to a file.

last_tab.title: Last tab
last_tab.summary: Switch to the most recently used tab.

goto_tab.title: Go to tab
goto_tab.summary: Jump to a tab by number.

toggle_tab_overview.title: Tab overview
toggle_tab_overview.summary: Show all tabs at a glance.

new_split.title: New split
new_split.summary: Split the terminal into another pane.

close_surface.title: Close terminal
close_surface.summary: Close the focused split or tab.

goto_split.title: Focus a split
goto_split.summary: Move keyboard focus to an adjacent split.

resize_split.title: Resize split
resize_split.summary: Grow or shrink the focused split.

toggle_quick_terminal.title: Quick terminal
toggle_quick_terminal.summary: Show or hide the drop-down quick terminal.

open_config.title: Open config file
open_config.summary: Open the Ghostty config in your editor.

toggle_secure_input.title: Secure keyboard entry
toggle_secure_input.summary: Block other apps from reading your keystrokes.

reset.title: Reset terminal
reset.summary: Reset the terminal to a clean state.

esc.title: Send escape
esc.summary: Send an escape sequence to the terminal.

text.title: Send text
text.summary: Send literal text to the terminal.

unbind.title: Remove this shortcut
unbind.summary: Unbind the trigger so it does nothing special.
